chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No. D–3253 of 2021 ( Naeem Akhtar & Others v. Province of Sindh & Others ) ____________________________________________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(s) OF JUDGE(s) ____________________________________________________ 1. For Orders on CMA No. 4708 / 2025 (Contempt App) 2. For Orders on Office Objections 3. For Orders on CMA No. 26771 / 2021 (O 39 R. 1 & 2 CPC App) 4. For Hearing of CMA No. 26355 / 2023 (O 23 R. 3 CPC App) 5. For Hearing of CMA No. 13812 / 2021 (O 39 R. 1 & 2 CPC App) 6. For Hearing of Main Case 19-5-2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Shaikh, Advocate for Petitioners Mr. Ameet Kumar, Advocate for Respondent No.6 Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, AAG, Sindh along with: (i) Mr. Abdul Wajid Shaikh, Registrar Cooperative Societies Sindh (ii) Mr. Hasnain Shah, Deputy Registrar (Legal & Technical) (iii) Mr. Ghulam Muhammad, Assistant Registrar ------------------------------------ 1. Sana Akram Minhas J: The Court, on 22.4.2025, had ordered that: This matter essentially pertains to the elections of the Saudagran Cooperative Housing Society Limited which, according to the Counsel in attendance, have not been held over a protracted period despite certain Orders that have been made in C.P. No.D-7907/2017 [Aijaz Ahmed & Others v. Province of Sindh], which was disposed of by Order dated 12.12.2017. Let a functionary from the office of the Registrar, Cooperative Societies be in attendance on the next date for purposes of assistance. To come up on 19.5.2025. 2. Today, the Registrar, Cooperative Societies (Respondent No.2), who is present, has submitted a copy of his Order dated 14.5.2025.

To come up on 19.5.2025. 2. Today, the Registrar, Cooperative Societies (Respondent No.2), who is present, has submitted a copy of his Order dated 14.5.2025. The said Order, inter alia, appoints an Election Officer and enjoins that elections for the position of President and the entire Managing Committee of Saudagran Cooperative Housing Society Ltd (Respondent No.7) shall be held within thirty days of the Election Officer receiving the Order. 3. With regard to the eligibility of individuals to contest the upcoming elections, the Registrar, Cooperative Societies, shall ensure that the elections are conducted strictly in accordance with, inter alia, the Sindh Cooperative Societies Act and Rules, 2020, in particular Rule 9, and the Byelaws of the Society. As a result, this Petition, along with all pending applications, is hereby of disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE
